description: An association of craftspeople or professionals; community organized around shared skill. 'Temu' names those bound by craft—learning and practicing together.
sound_symbolism: The word touches with craft. 'Te' connects with skilled contact, craft joining. 'Mu' grounds with deep mastery, knowledge rooted.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'mia mua temu shonela.' (I learn in the guild.) An organization of those sharing 'thole' (practice). Related to 'shorai' (commune) but organized around skill; the 'moloi' (apprentice) learns within it.

pillars.solarpunk-values: Skill sharing—communities organized to spread knowledge rather than hoard it.
pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Guild as transmission—craft knowledge passed from master to apprentice.
